expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: search box selector dropdown planning covers OK or Cancel confirmation, pending selection, and dismissal outcomes
expectations.evidence: In result.md, the “Case focus” section explicitly lists all required items: “OK confirmation”, “Cancel confirmation”, “Pending selection”, and “Dismissal outcomes”. It further maps evidence to OK/pending/dismissal and notes Cancel as a paired outcome: “Cancel confirmation: not explicitly stated... but is a standard paired outcome for an OK-confirm pattern; Phase 4a planning structure supports including it as a scenario...”.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md repeatedly anchors to Phase 4a: “Primary phase under test: Phase 4a” and “Output alignment with Phase 4a contract” with constraints such as “Requires subcategory/scenario/atomic steps/observable leaves” and “Forbids canonical top-layer categories”. execution_notes.md also states: “Primary phase under test: Phase 4a” and “Evaluation anchored to: references/phase4a-contract.md”.
